rulings.Case Title: CHRISTOPHER PORTER ET AL VS. COOK GENERAL CONTRACTOR INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A Cross-Complaint Against Cross-Defendants
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2024 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT COOK GENERAL CONTRACTOR INC. Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A Cross-Complaint Against Cross-Defendants is continued to October 21, 2024 to be heard by the Honorable Charles F. Haines. =(501/JMQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: DEVENDRA PATEL VS. EUGENE SINGLETARY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Eugene Singletary To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents, And To Deem Matters Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2024 line 6. PLAINTIFF DEVENDRA PATEL Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Eugene Singletary To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents, And To Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Request for Production and Special Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Admissions are deemed admitted. =(501/JMQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: 905 COLUMBUS AVENUE, LLC VS. PRASHANT SALUNKE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Prashant Salunke To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents, And To Deem Matters Admitted
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 15, 2024 line 8. PLAINTIFF 905 COLUMBUS AVENUE, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Prashant Salunke To Respond To Written Discovery, Produce Documents, And To Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion to Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Request for Production and Special Interrogatories within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Motion to deem admissions admitted is DENIED, moot. Responses provided on October 14, 2024. =(501/JMQ) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
